title: Heartland Whole Health Institute
author: Antony Dawson
concept: A study of spatial warmth, timber geometry, and the way the interior ceiling structure shapes the experience of gathering and movement within the building.
process: Documented the project through observational photography, frame selection, and close study of the curved wood ceiling system and public circulation zones.
final: A visual documentation archive highlighting atmosphere, material rhythm, and the relationship between structure, ceiling geometry, and public occupation.
